name: lever
description: Use Lever to find constraints, build leverage, and turn durable corrections into better agent behavior.

interface.longDescription: Lever routes leverage scoring, bottleneck diagnosis, durable corrections, learning distillation, and bounded agent-build decisions to the live Lever CLI. It is the agent that asks whether the work creates power, not just motion.
defaultPrompt: Use Lever to score the highest-leverage move.
Ask Lever whether this should become an agent.
Use Lever to record and distill this durable correction.
